Upgrade my EXISTING JCET Hub project into a fully dynamic application using Firebase (Firestore).

STRICT RULE:

* DO NOT change UI, layout, colors, or structure
* ONLY replace dummy/static values with real dynamic data
* Preserve all existing components and design exactly as it is

---

GOAL:
Convert current static dashboard into a real-time working system:

* Campus Points → dynamic
* QR Attendance → functional
* Activity Resume → auto-generated
* Organizer stats → real values
* Remove all NaN and dummy values

---

1. FIREBASE INTEGRATION

* Add Firebase config file
* Initialize Firestore
* Use collections:

users/
events/
attendance/

* Connect existing UI to Firebase data

---

2. FIX EXISTING UI VALUES (IMPORTANT)

Replace:

* "0 XP" → real user xp from Firestore
* "0 attended" → actual attendance count
* "NaN" → always show 0 if no data
* "9 active events" → fetch from events collection

---

3. CAMPUS POINTS (UPGRADE EXISTING CARD)

* Fetch user data dynamically

* Calculate:
  level = Math.floor(xp / 100) + 1
  remainingXP = 100 - (xp % 100)

* Update UI without changing design

---

4. QR ATTENDANCE (UPGRADE BUTTON)

* When QR or button is used:

  * Add record in attendance collection
  * Update user xp using increment()
  * Increase eventsAttended

* Connect to existing QR section UI

---

5. ACTIVITY RESUME (MAKE IT REAL)

* Fetch user attendance

* Map event types to skills:
  hackathon → problem solving
  workshop → tech skills
  club → teamwork
  organizer → leadership

* Update existing badges dynamically

* Make "Generate Resume" button functional

---

6. ORGANIZER SECTION FIX

* total registrations = attendance count

* active events = events collection count

* avg engagement = attendance / events

* If no data:
  show 0 (NOT NaN)

---

7. REAL-TIME UPDATES (IMPORTANT)

* Use onSnapshot() for:

  * user data
  * events
  * attendance

* UI must auto-update when data changes

---

8. ERROR HANDLING

* Prevent undefined values
* Always use fallback:
  value || 0

---

9. CODE INTEGRATION RULES

* Modify existing files ONLY
* Do NOT rewrite full project
* Inject Firebase logic into current components

---

10. OUTPUT

* Updated code integrated into existing project
* Firebase config placeholder
* Comments explaining where changes were made

---

FINAL RESULT:

My CURRENT UI should stay EXACTLY SAME
but now:

* XP increases in real-time
* Attendance works
* Resume builds dynamically
* No dummy data anywhere

---
